# Test partition layout (8MB flash): the factory partition is large enough to
# embed all Erlang test modules together with the AOT-compiled atomvmlib needed
# to resolve estdlib calls when JIT is enabled (AVM_NO_EMU mode). The main.avm
# partition is unused by the host firmware but kept so the test_esp_partition
# enumeration test has a stable layout.
# Name
nvs
phy_init
factory
lib.avm
main.avm
data
